description: SeatGeek is a live-events ticket marketplace and platform for discovering events, venues, performers, and related ticketing data. Its public-facing developer materials reference APIs for event and recommendation data and a developer portal for partner access.
summary: SeatGeek exposes a documented-but-access-controlled platform HTTP API surface with publicly referenced developer portals, plus a public unauthenticated MCP server at `https://chatgpt-app.seatgeek.com/mcp` over SSE.
